channel.title: Cs.CL on 技术观察学习者
channel.description: Recent content in Cs.CL on 技术观察学习者

item.title: Evaluation of Automatic Speech Recognition Using Generative Large Language Models
item.description: 论文信息 标题: Evaluation of Automatic Speech Recognition Using Generative Large Language Models 作者: Thibault Bañeras-Roux, Shashi Kumar, Driss Khalil, Sergio Burdisso, Petr Motlicek, Shiran Liu, Mickael Rouvier, Jane Wottawa, Richard Dufour 发表日期: 2026-04-23 arXiv ID: 2604.21928v1 PDF 链接: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.21928v1 分类 cs.CL 摘要 Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) is traditionally evaluated using Word Error Rate (WER), a metric that is insensitive to meaning. Embedding-based semantic metrics are better correlated with human perception, but decoder-based Large Language Models (LLMs) remain underexplored for this task.
